qaPairs.speakerText: Hi there! Welcome to Hotel Sunshine. How can I help you today?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 嗨！欢迎光临阳光酒店，有什么可以帮您的吗？

responses.text: Hi! I've got a reservation under John Smith.
responses.text_cn: 嗨，我有预订，名字是约翰·史密斯。

responses.text: Hey! Booked for John Smith, yeah?
responses.text_cn: 嘿，我订了，名字是约翰·史密斯，对吧？

responses.text: I'm John Smith. I booked a room.
responses.text_cn: 我是约翰·史密斯，我订了房间。

qaPairs.usageNote: 先打招呼，再报预订名，自然开场

qaPairs.speakerText: Could I see your passport or ID, please?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 能出示一下您的护照或身份证吗？

responses.text: Of course, here's my passport.
Sure, here you go. I also have my booking confirmation.
responses.text_cn: 好的，给您。我还有预订确认单。

qaPairs.speakerText: We'll need a credit card for the security deposit. It's $100, which will be released upon checkout.
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 我们需要一张信用卡作为押金，100美元，退房时会退还。

responses.text: No problem. Here's my credit card.
responses.text_cn: 没问题，这是我的信用卡。

responses.text: Can I pay the deposit in cash instead?
responses.text_cn: 押金可以用现金支付吗？

qaPairs.speakerText: You're all set! Here are your key cards. Your room is 512 on the fifth floor.
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 一切就绪！这是您的房卡。您的房间是五楼512号。

responses.text: Thank you! Is there an elevator?

qaPairs.usageNote: 前台完成登记后的告知

qaPairs.speakerText: Let me check that for you... Yep, John Smith, one night, standard room. Is that right?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 我查一下... 对，约翰·史密斯，住一晚，标准间，对吗？

responses.text: Yes, that's correct. Thanks!
Yeah, perfect! Just me and my wife.
responses.text_cn: 对，太好了！就我和我老婆。

responses.text: Correct.

qaPairs.usageNote: 确认信息时，用yes或yeah都行，别紧张

qaPairs.speakerText: Do you have any special requests? Like extra pillows or a late check-out?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 您有特殊要求吗？比如多要枕头或延迟退房？

responses.text: No, thanks. Everything's fine.
Actually, could I get an extra towel?
Nope.

qaPairs.usageNote: 想要东西就说could I get...，简单直接

qaPairs.speakerText: Yes, breakfast is included. We also have a rooftop pool open until 10 PM.
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 是的，早餐已包含在内。我们还有屋顶泳池，开放到晚上10点。

responses.text: Wonderful! What's the Wi-Fi password?
That's great. Is there a spa as well?

qaPairs.usageNote: 了解包含服务和额外设施

qaPairs.speakerText: The Wi-Fi password is on the card in your room. If you need anything, just dial 0 for the front desk.
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: Wi-Fi密码在您房间的卡片上。如果需要任何帮助，拨0联系前台。

responses.text: Perfect. Thank you for all your help!
Got it. Dial 0 for the front desk. Thank you!
responses.text_cn: 明白了，拨0联系前台。谢谢！

qaPairs.speakerText: Could I see your passport, please? And we'll need a $50 deposit for incidentals.
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 能出示一下您的护照吗？另外需要50美元押金作为杂费。

responses.text: Sure, here's my passport. I'll pay with my card.
responses.text_cn: 好的，这是护照，我用信用卡付。

responses.text: Here you go. Cash or card?
Passport. Card only.

qaPairs.usageNote: 递证件时说here's，付押金时明确支付方式

qaPairs.speakerText: Here's your final bill. You have a $25 charge for the minibar.
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 这是您的最终账单。小冰箱消费了25美元。

responses.text: Let me check — yes, that's correct.
Actually, I didn't use the minibar. Could you double-check?
responses.text_cn: 其实我没用小冰箱，能再确认一下吗？

qaPairs.usageNote: 核对账单上的额外消费

qaPairs.speakerText: How would you like to settle the bill?

responses.text: Please charge it to the credit card on file.
responses.text_cn: 请从存档的信用卡扣款。

responses.text: I'll pay cash. Here's $200.

qaPairs.speakerText: All done! Your deposit has been released. We hope you enjoyed your stay. Please come back soon!
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 完成了！押金已退还。希望您住得愉快，欢迎再次光临！

responses.text: Thank you! I had a wonderful stay.

qaPairs.speakerText: The WiFi is free. The password's on the card. Breakfast is from 7 to 10 in the dining room.
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: WiFi免费，密码在卡片上。早餐7点到10点在餐厅。

responses.text: Great! Is the WiFi good in the room?
What time's breakfast end?
Thanks. WiFi password?

qaPairs.usageNote: 问WiFi和早餐时间，用简单句问清楚就行

qaPairs.speakerText: We also have a free shuttle to the city center at 8 AM and 6 PM.
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 我们还有免费班车，早上8点和下午6点发车去市中心。

responses.text: Do you have a shuttle after 10 PM?
No thanks, I'll walk.
Shuttle at 6? Perfect!

qaPairs.usageNote: 想坐班车就问有没有晚班，别怕问

subScenes.name: 道别与指引
subScenes.description: 领取房卡并指引房间位置

qaPairs.speakerText: Here's your key card. Room 402 is on the fourth floor, elevator's right there.
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 这是您的房卡，402房在四楼，电梯就在那儿。

responses.text: Thanks! Is there a fridge in the room?
Got it. Thanks a lot!
402, okay.

qaPairs.usageNote: 道别前可再问1个问题，说完就走不拖沓
